ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "classification_system" TEXT /* Classification system the region belongs to (e.g., R5_REGION, AIM/CGE) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code of the region within its classification system */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  "region_population" TEXT /* Estimated population of the region */,
  "region_area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_classification_system FOREIGN KEY ("classification_system") REFERENCES classification_systems ("classification_system_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_parent_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_regions" (
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-region mapping */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date from which the country is part of the region */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date until which the country is part of the region (NULL if current) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification_systems" (
  "classification_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification system */,
  "classification_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification system */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or organization that developed the classification system */,
  "year_of_establishment" INTEGER /* Year when the classification system was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hierarchical_regions" (
  "hierarchical_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchical region */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the region in the hierarchy */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., Continent, Country, Sub-region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchical_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hierarchical_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hierarchical_regions_parent_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
column_names: Total area of the country in square kilometers
